mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.product_id, r.member_id, r.order_item_id, r.rating, r.content, r.image_urls, r.is_deleted, r.created_at, r.updated_at, m.nickname FROM reviews r JOIN members m ON r.member_id = m.id WHERE r.id = #{id}

SELECT r.id, r.product_id, r.member_id, r.order_item_id, r.rating, r.content, r.image_urls, r.is_deleted, r.created_at, r.updated_at, m.nickname FROM reviews r JOIN members m ON r.member_id = m.id WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} AND r.is_deleted = false ORDER BY r.created_at DESC

SELECT r.id, r.product_id, r.member_id, r.order_item_id, r.rating, r.content, r.image_urls, r.is_deleted, r.created_at, r.updated_at, m.nickname FROM reviews r JOIN members m ON r.member_id = m.id WHERE r.product_id = #{productId} AND r.is_deleted = false
AND r.image_urls IS NOT NULL AND r.image_urls != '[]'
ORDER BY r.rating DESC, r.created_at DESC
ORDER BY r.rating ASC, r.created_at DESC
ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT r.id, r.product_id, r.member_id, r.order_item_id, r.rating, r.content, r.image_urls, r.is_deleted, r.created_at, r.updated_at, m.nickname FROM reviews r JOIN members m ON r.member_id = m.id WHERE r.member_id = #{memberId} AND r.is_deleted = false ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM reviews WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND product_id = #{productId} AND is_deleted = false )
SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM reviews WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND order_item_id = #{orderItemId} AND is_deleted = false )
SELECT AVG(rating) FROM reviews WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND is_deleted = false
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND is_deleted = false
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews (product_id, member_id, order_item_id, rating, content, image_urls, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{productId}, #{memberId}, #{orderItemId}, #{rating}, #{content}, #{imageUrls, typeHandler=com.fluxmall.global.config.mybatis.StringListTypeHandler}, false, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET rating = #{rating}, content = #{content}, image_urls = #{imageUrls, typeHandler=com.fluxmall.global.config.mybatis.StringListTypeHandler}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
